I checked on prices for Top Golf and Fat Cats on Friday. It look like top golf provides a meal. I'm guessing they don't let you bring your own meal. If we want Top Golf it looks like we should go after lunch with no meal



Top Golf:

2 hours, 30 people - $700

Leaderboard - $100

Fajita Lunch - $1050

Total - 2135.73





Fat Cats (Bowling)

90 Minutes Bowling, 

(1) 60 Min Arcade Time Play Card, 

Large Pizza, & 

Drinks for 6.

1 lane



$99



So if we get 9 lanes for 900 that gives us 9 large pizzas and 3 people per lane





I'm open to other suggestions

entries.LogEntry: This is a lambda. A lambda has no open inbound ports. We will set up the SG to block any IB trafiic, even though there are no avaialble ports. Because this is not a security concern, and because we want to reduce risk, we will be ready to deploy our changes immediatly after next regression testing period with our other changes. Currently, our regression testing is scheduled to end on July 30
entries.Subject: c2fbb4c5-4f62-4251-bd55-a7b09befae15

entries.LogEntry: This is behind a firewall. Multiple services communicate using this security group. We need to run extensive tests to assure our changes do not break the application. Will be ready to deploy our changes immediatly after next regression testing period. Currently, our regression testing is scheduled to end on July 30
entries.Subject: c2fbb4c5-4f62-4251-bd55-a7b09befae15

entries.LogEntry:
What is the plan for shared EKS deployment? Is Prague team going to do this? Petr? (get ansswer to Dhirave in next 1:1)

Probably not prague taking over. We need to meet with Gregory to see what we can do. It is managed through their piepleine, but it is all manual. You can't automate the charts and worklosds. We might need tochane how we are codign so they can do automatic releases.

Marting convo -- Marting didn't think they would take over because not automated

Code changes needed. E.g Divianal work Kylee did -- if only lambda version went out, it would cause failures in shared EKS because she added a new field in protobuff objects. We need to be aware of changes we are doing or we need a way to update protobuff files that will impact shared EKS version. 

Can ew make everything "Omit" initiallay.  We also need a feature toggle inplace

We will discuss in Architect meeting
entries.Subject: b1707ef0-16a7-402b-814a-90f3bb2893ea
